description: NOTAM Intelligence — NOTAM filtering, plain English translation, and impact assessment for planned routes

hard_stops.label: TFR on Route
hard_stops.logic: Temporary Flight Restriction active along the planned route — reroute required

hard_stops.label: Airport Closed via NOTAM
hard_stops.logic: Destination airport closed during planned arrival window per active NOTAM

soft_flags.label: Runway Closure at Destination
soft_flags.logic: One or more runways at the destination are closed, potentially affecting operations

soft_flags.label: Navigation Aid OOS on Route
soft_flags.logic: A navigation aid along the route of flight is out of service

soft_flags.label: Obstacle New or Changed
soft_flags.logic: New or changed obstruction reported near the route or at departure/destination

soft_flags.label: Military Activity Near Route
soft_flags.logic: Active or scheduled military activity in airspace near the planned route

soft_flags.label: Special Activity Airspace Active
soft_flags.logic: Special use airspace (MOA, restricted area, alert area) is active along the route
